title: Senior Carbon Project Auditor
description: We are seeking a Senior Carbon Auditor to lead validation and verification activities under CCTS and voluntary registries. Experience in Gold Standard, Verra, or GCC frameworks is required.

title: Agricultural Research Associate (Biochar)
description: Join our field research team to coordinate soil sampling, biochar kiln deployments, and carbon sequestration measurements in collaboration with local FPOs.

title: Climate Policy Analyst
description: Analyze legislative developments surrounding the Green Credit Programme (GCP) and Article 6. Draft policy briefs, research papers, and responses to draft regulations.
